expectations.text: Research document covers navigation-related files (NavigationContext, Sidebar, TopBar, AppShell, or equivalent routing components)
expectations.evidence: Document covers all 14 skills, 25 commands, 12 agents, workflow phase transitions, Spectrum navigation, and debug/iteration loops — the navigation components of this plugin.

expectations.text: Document includes file:line references, not just file names
expectations.evidence: Code References section includes file:line references like 'skills/prism/SKILL.md:37-45', 'skills/prism/SKILL.md:48-62', 'skills/prism-research/SKILL.md:1-5', etc.
Frontmatter date is 2026-03-08 and topic follows the convention. Document format matches YYYY-MM-DD-topic.md.
Output is in eval outputs directory (old_skill/outputs/research.md). No explicit confirmation it was saved to .prism/shared/research/.

expectations.text: Document has required sections: Research Question, Summary, Files Discovered, Component Analysis
expectations.evidence: All four sections present: 'Research Question', 'Summary', 'Files Discovered' table, and 'Component Analysis' with detailed subsections.

expectations.text: No improvement suggestions or critiques appear (documentarian principle)
expectations.evidence: Document only describes what exists without suggesting improvements or critiquing the architecture.
